## Inconsistency: Online Policy Dependent Feedback {.nav-feedback}

Rather than learning a reward function, can we skip straight to robotic decision-making?

- Binary human feedback is *policy-dependent* 
- Users judge current actions relative to other possible actions 

This definition is synonymous with the *advantage function*

::: {.callout-tip title="Definition: Advantage Function"}
The advantage $A(s,a)$ measures the relative value of action $a$ at $s$ via $A(s,a) = Q(s,a) - V(s)$.
:::

COACH leverages this to learn new behaviors and unlearn old ones.

<div style="margin-top: -0.0em;">[@coach]{style="font-size: 0.6em;"}.</div>
